title: Kids Licensed Character Analog Wall Clock Kids Bedroom Home Decor Wall Art
description:
This Captain America officially licensed wall clock is a great addition to any kid’s bedroom who is obsessed with Marvel! The watch face features a classic rendition of Captain America and his iconic red, white and blue colors. Analog wall clocks are wonderful for teaching children how to tell time. They can learn about the second, minute, and hour hands and learn to tell time with instruction from Mom and Dad. These wall clocks feature Quartz accuracy so you can count on them to always have an accurate time. They are battery operated (requires one AA battery, not included), and can easily mount to just about any wall. This Captain America wall clock measures 12.5” x 10.5”, making it the perfect size for your child’s bedroom
